eventType.Name: eventType
eventType.Description: Which event to display the value of

optionalTier.Name: optionalTier
optionalTier.Description: For certain events, you can define which variation to display. For example, TwitchSub has tier 1000, 2000, 3000

valueType.Name: valueType
valueType.Description: Show the seconds or points value of the event?

showSuffix.Name: showSuffix
showSuffix.Description: Show the suffix for the value type? s for Seconds, pts for Points

GoogleFonts.description: Additional google fonts to load to use in CSS Variables. Comma separated.
